evals.expected_output: Skill creates job-search/companies/stripe/ directory, writes research.md from template with 'Stripe' substituted for [Company Name], then guides the user section by section: first asking about overview/financials, then culture, then leadership, then recent news, then helping articulate why this company fits.
assertions: research.md contains '# Company Research: Stripe' as the heading
research.md contains all template sections: Overview, Products & Services, Financial Health, Culture & Values, Key Leadership, Competitive Landscape, Why This Company, Research Sources
Skill asks for information section by section, not all at once
Skill asks about overview/financials first before moving to culture

evals.prompt: research company Acme Corp for me
evals.expected_output: Skill handles natural language phrasing, converts 'Acme Corp' to slug 'acme-corp', creates job-search/companies/acme-corp/research.md with correct heading 'Company Research: Acme Corp', and walks through research sections interactively.
assertions: research.md contains '# Company Research: Acme Corp' as the heading
Skill guides user through at least 4 distinct research sections
Completion message mentions /add-position as next step

evals.expected_output: After the user provides research findings for each section, the skill fills in the template fully and marks off which Research Sources were consulted. The 'Why This Company' section reflects the user's narrative.md target roles and industries.
assertions: research.md Research Sources checklist has at least one source checked off after user provides data
research.md Why This Company section contains substantive content (not left as placeholder)
Completion message mentions /add-position <company> <role> as next step
